notes: Short focused file (143 lines, 5 declarations) proving Silverman IV.4.4 that [p](T) lies in R[[T^p]] for a formal group over a characteristic-p ring. The main theorem mulByP_exists_expand uses the invariant-differential chain rule from InvariantDiff.lean as its key engine. mulByP_decomposition is a trivially weaker Silverman-shaped corollary with no known callers in the project.
